colors.colormixin.name: colormixin
colors.colormixin.description:
Generates a color-mix() CSS expression using variable references.
With opacity: wraps in a second color-mix for transparency.

style.style.name: style
style.style.description:
Visual styling utilities for spacing, typography, borders, shadows, depth,
and interaction cursors. Generates named CSS class rules that reference
design token variables from `tokens.js`.
Spacing classes use a 0–8 index scale mapped to `--margin-{i}` and
`--pad-{i}` token variables. Directional shorthands follow the pattern:
`m`/`p` = margin/padding, `t/b/l/r` = side, `h/v` = horizontal/vertical.

tokens.tokens.name: tokens
tokens.tokens.description:
This defines the main parameters for the style. They can be overriden
at will to theme everything.

uicss.kebab.name: kebab
uicss.kebab.description: Normalizes a name to kebab-case for CSS keys and variables.

uicss.times.name: times
uicss.times.description: Builds an array by calling a mapper function n times.

uicss.percent.name: percent
uicss.percent.description: Formats a decimal number as a rounded percentage string.

uicss.properties.name: properties
uicss.properties.description: Flattens nested property objects into `[key, value]` CSS pairs.

uicss.classes.name: classes
uicss.classes.description: Prefixes each class name with a `.` selector marker.

uicss.where.name: where
uicss.where.description: Wraps an array of selectors in a `:where(...)` pseudo-class.

uicss.cross.name: cross
uicss.cross.description: Builds the cartesian product of selector fragments.

uicss.blend.name: blend
uicss.blend.description: Mixes two colors in oklab space with optional transparency.

uicss.contrast.name: contrast
uicss.contrast.description: Returns a CSS contrast-color expression for a background color.

uicss.blended.name: blended
uicss.blended.description: Builds one or more CSS variables from a blended color recipe.

uicss.Meta.name: Meta
uicss.Meta.description: Base wrapper for values that carry non-rule metadata.

uicss.Documentation.name: Documentation
uicss.Documentation.description: Metadata node used to attach documentation payloads.

uicss.Scope.name: Scope
uicss.Scope.description: Tracks nested CSS variable scopes and lazily creates child scopes.

uicss.scope.name: scope
uicss.scope.description: Wraps a scope instance in a proxy that autovivifies nested paths.

uicss.pseudo.name: pseudo
uicss.pseudo.description: Appends a pseudo-selector to each selector in a flat list.

uicss.mods.name: mods
uicss.mods.description: Expands class modifiers into complete selector combinations.

uicss.Rule.name: Rule
uicss.Rule.description: Represents a CSS selector block and its declaration properties.

uicss.NestingRule.name: NestingRule
uicss.NestingRule.description:
A rule that contains nested child rules emitted with native CSS nesting.
Children use `&` syntax inside the parent block, avoiding selector repetition.

uicss.AtRule.name: AtRule
uicss.AtRule.description: Represents a CSS at-rule wrapper such as  or .

uicss.rule.name: rule
uicss.rule.description: Creates a `Rule` from selectors and mixed body inputs.

uicss.blockselectors.name: blockselectors
uicss.blockselectors.description: Normalizes a selector value into a flat selector list.

uicss.blockcompose.name: blockcompose
uicss.blockcompose.description: Composes parent and child selectors, including `&` replacement.

uicss.blockmappings.name: blockmappings
uicss.blockmappings.description: Normalizes nested block payloads into selector maps.

uicss.blockbody.name: blockbody
uicss.blockbody.description: Expands a block body into concrete rules.

uicss.block.name: block
uicss.block.description: Creates a `Group` from nested selector maps.

uicss.Group.name: Group
uicss.Group.description: Collects rules and nested groups into a traversable unit.

uicss.group.name: group
uicss.group.description: Shorthand for creating a `Group` from rule values.

uicss.media.name: media
uicss.media.description: Creates an `` at-rule containing regular ui.css rules or groups.

uicss.keyframes.name: keyframes
uicss.keyframes.description: Creates an `` at-rule from a frame-to-properties mapping.

uicss.Layer.name: Layer
uicss.Layer.description: Specialized group that emits its content inside ``.

uicss.layer.name: layer
uicss.layer.description: Shorthand for creating a `Layer` from rule values.

uicss.layers.name: layers
uicss.layers.description: Converts an object of named groups into layer instances.

uicss.named.name: named
uicss.named.description: Converts a key/value map into named groups for organization.

uicss.guard.name: guard
uicss.guard.description: Scopes CSS values under a root selector with native nesting.

uicss.Token.name: Token
uicss.Token.description: Represents a single design token rendered as a CSS variable.

uicss.Tokens.name: Tokens
uicss.Tokens.description: Group wrapper that expands objects into token declarations.

uicss.tokens.name: tokens
uicss.tokens.description: Creates a `Tokens` group from one or more token collections.

uicss.css.name: css
uicss.css.description: Recursively renders values that expose a `lines()` generator.

uicss.docs.name: docs
uicss.docs.description: Recursively emits documentation entries from documentable values.

uicss.css_mount.name: css.mount
uicss.css_mount.description: Mounts generated style blocks into `document.head` when available.

uicss.nesting.name: nesting
uicss.nesting.description:
Creates a NestingRule with native CSS nesting. The parent selector and
properties are given first, followed by child Rule objects that will be
emitted inside the parent block using their selectors as-is (typically
starting with `&`).
